messages.content: You answer questions about the Bible. Never quote a verse from memory: always look it up with the lookup_verse tool, and quote only what it returns.
Give me 5 Bible verses about forgiveness, with the exact KJV text of each.

function.name: lookup_verse
function.description: Look up the exact text of a Bible verse by reference, e.g. "John 3:16".

messages.content: You answer questions about the Bible. Never quote a verse from memory: always look it up with the lookup_verse tool, and quote only what it returns.
Give me 5 Bible verses about forgiveness, with the exact KJV text of each.
And be ye kind one to another, tenderhearted, forgiving one another, even as God for Christ’s sake hath forgiven you.
Forbearing one another, and forgiving one another, if any man have a quarrel against any: even as Christ forgave you, so also [do] ye.
For if ye forgive men their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you:
As far as the east is from the west, [so] far hath he removed our transgressions from us.
Judge not, and ye shall not be judged: condemn not, and ye shall not be condemned: forgive, and ye shall be forgiven:

function.name: lookup_verse
function.description: Look up the exact text of a Bible verse by reference, e.g. "John 3:16".

message.content:
Here are five Bible verses about forgiveness from the King James Version (KJV):

1. **Ephesians 4:32** — "And be ye kind one to another, tenderhearted, forgiving one another, even as God for Christ’s sake hath forgiven you."

2. **Colossians 3:13** — "Forbearing one another, and forgiving one another, if any man have a quarrel against any: even as Christ forgave you, so also [do] ye."

3. **Matthew 6:14** — "For if ye forgive men their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you:"

4. **Psalm 103:12** — "As far as the east is from the west, [so] far hath he removed our transgressions from us."

5. **Luke 6:37** — "Judge not, and ye shall not be judged: condemn not, and ye shall not be condemned: forgive, and ye shall be forgiven:"

text.KJV: And be ye kind one to another, tenderhearted, forgiving one another, even as God for Christ’s sake hath forgiven you.
Forbearing one another, and forgiving one another, if any man have a quarrel against any: even as Christ forgave you, so also [do] ye.
For if ye forgive men their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you:
As far as the east is from the west, [so] far hath he removed our transgressions from us.
Judge not, and ye shall not be judged: condemn not, and ye shall not be condemned: forgive, and ye shall be forgiven:

finalAnswer:
The model's answer:Here are five Bible verses about forgiveness from the King James Version (KJV):

1. **Ephesians 4:32** — "And be ye kind one to another, tenderhearted, forgiving one another, even as God for Christ’s sake hath forgiven you."

2. **Colossians 3:13** — "Forbearing one another, and forgiving one another, if any man have a quarrel against any: even as Christ forgave you, so also [do] ye."

3. **Matthew 6:14** — "For if ye forgive men their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you:"

4. **Psalm 103:12** — "As far as the east is from the west, [so] far hath he removed our transgressions from us."

5. **Luke 6:37** — "Judge not, and ye shall not be judged: condemn not, and ye shall not be condemned: forgive, and ye shall be forgiven:"
